title: microsorum pteropus var. zosteriforme
intro: Microsorum pteropus var. zosteriforme, also known as Water Wisteria, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Water Wisteria include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
